children.heading: Compliance required
children.label: a Compliance required
children.text: The Administrator shall ensure that the Administration complies with all applicable environmental, safety, and health statutes and substantive requirements.

children.heading: Procedures required
children.label: b Procedures required
children.text: The Administrator shall develop procedures for meeting such requirements.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: c Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall diminish the authority of the Secretary of Energy to ascertain and ensure that such compliance occurs.
